creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 151197
Proposed patch (with additions and changes)

Hello, Thomas Zander.

(In reply to Thomas Zander from comment #7)
> Warning from portlint:
> pkg-plist: [1]: @stopdaemon is deprecated.  The pkg(8) has a generic
> mechanism to provide the same function, see HANDLE_RC_SCRIPTS in pkg.conf(5).

I guess, there is a need to just remove "@stopdaemon dnscrypt-proxy" from pkg-plist.
Like the other commiters did, e.g. on the following svn revisions: 367015, 367016, 367085, 368912.
